Accordion.title: Accordion
Accordion.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal an associated section of content.
Accordion.name: accordion

keyboard.description: When focus is on an AccordionTrigger of a collapsed section, expands the section.
When focus is on an AccordionTrigger of a collapsed section, expands the section.
Moves focus to the next focusable element.
Moves focus to the previous focusable element.
Moves focus to the next AccordionTrigger when orientation is vertical.
Moves focus to the previous AccordionTrigger when orientation is vertical.
Moves focus to the next AccordionTrigger when orientation is horizontal.
Moves focus to the previous AccordionTrigger when orientation is horizontal.
When focus is on an AccordionTrigger, moves focus to the start AccordionTrigger.
When focus is on an AccordionTrigger, moves focus to the last AccordionTrigger.

AlertDialog.title: Alert Dialog
AlertDialog.description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content and expects a response.
AlertDialog.name: alert-dialog

keyboard.description: Opens/closes the dialog.
Opens/closes the dialog.
Moves focus to the next focusable element.
Moves focus to the previous focusable element.
Closes the dialog and moves focus to AlertDialogTrigger.

AspectRatio.title: Aspect Ratio
AspectRatio.description: Displays content within a desired ratio.
AspectRatio.name: aspect-ratio

Avatar.title: Avatar
Avatar.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.
Avatar.name: avatar

Calendar.title: Calendar
Calendar.description: Displays dates and days of the week, facilitating date-related interactions.
Calendar.name: calendar

Checkbox.title: Checkbox
Checkbox.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.
Checkbox.name: checkbox

keyboard.description: Checks/unchecks the checkbox

Collapsible.title: Collapsible
Collapsible.description: An interactive component which expands/collapses a panel.
Collapsible.name: collapsible

keyboard.description: Opens/closes the collapsible
Opens/closes the collapsible

Combobox.title: Combobox
Combobox.description: Choose from a list of suggested values with full keyboard support.
Combobox.name: combobox

keyboard.description: When focus is on ComboboxItem, selects the focused item.

When focus is on ComboboxInput, opens the combobox content.
When focus is on an item, moves focus to the next item.

When focus is on ComboboxInput, opens the combobox content.
When focus is on an item, moves focus to the previous item.
Closes combobox and restores the selected item in the ComboboxInput field.

ContextMenu.title: Context Menu
ContextMenu.description: Displays a menu located at the pointer, triggered by a right-click or a long-press.
ContextMenu.name: context-menu

DateField.title: Date Field
DateField.description: Enables users to input specific dates within a designated field.
DateField.name: date-field

DatePicker.title: Date Picker
DatePicker.description: Facilitates the selection of dates through an input and calendar-based interface.
DatePicker.name: date-picker

DateRangeField.title: Date Range Field
DateRangeField.description: Allows users to input a range of dates within a designated field.
DateRangeField.name: date-range-field

DateRangePicker.title: Date Range Picker
DateRangePicker.description: Facilitates the selection of date ranges through an input and calendar-based interface.
DateRangePicker.name: date-range-picker

Dialog.title: Dialog
Dialog.description: A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window, rendering the content underneath inert.
Dialog.name: dialog

keyboard.description: Opens/closes the dialog
Opens/closes the dialog
Moves focus to the next focusable element.
Moves focus to the previous focusable element.
Closes the dialog and moves focus to DialogTrigger.

DropdownMenu.title: Dropdown Menu
DropdownMenu.description: Displays a menu to the user—such as a set of actions or functions—triggered by a button.
DropdownMenu.name: dropdown-menu

Editable.title: Editable
Editable.description: Displays an input field used for editing a single line of text, rendering as static text on load.
Editable.name: editable

HoverCard.title: Hover Card
HoverCard.description: For sighted users to preview content available behind a link.
HoverCard.name: hover-card

keyboard.description: Opens/closes the hover card.
Opens the hover card link

Label.title: Label
Label.description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.
Label.name: label

Listbox.title: Listbox
Listbox.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.
Listbox.name: listbox

keyboard.description: When highlight on ListboxItem, selects the focused item.
When focus is on ListboxItem, moves focus to the next item.
When focus is on ListboxItem, moves focus to the previous item.
Moves focus and highlight to the first item.
Moves focus and highlight to the last item.
Select all the items.

Menubar.title: Menubar
Menubar.description: A visually persistent menu common in desktop applications that provides quick
Menubar.name: menubar

NavigationMenu.title: Navigation Menu
NavigationMenu.description: A collection of links for navigating websites.
NavigationMenu.name: navigation-menu

NumberField.title: Number Field
NumberField.description: A number field allows a user to enter a number and increment or decrement the value using stepper buttons.
NumberField.name: number field

keyboard.description: Increase the value
Decrease the value
Increase the value by scale of 10
Decrease the value by scale of 10
Set value to minimum (if min is provided)
Set value to maximum (if max is provided)

Pagination.title: Pagination
Pagination.description: Displays data in paged format and provides navigation between pages.
Pagination.name: pagination

PinInput.title: Pin Input
PinInput.description: A sequence of one-character alphanumeric inputs.
PinInput.name: pin-input

Popover.title: Popover
Popover.description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button.

keyboard.description: Opens/closes the popover.

Progress.title: Progress
Progress.description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task, typically displayed as a progress bar.
Progress.name: progress

RadioGroup.title: Radio Group
RadioGroup.description: A set of checkable buttons—known as radio buttons—where no more than one of the buttons can be checked at a time.
RadioGroup.name: radio-group

keyboard.description: Moves focus to either the checked radio item or the first radio item in the group.
When focus is on an unchecked radio item, checks it.
Moves focus and checks the next radio item in the group.
Moves focus and checks the next radio item in the group.

RangeCalendar.title: RangeCalendar
RangeCalendar.description: Presents a calendar view tailored for selecting date ranges.
RangeCalendar.name: range-calendar

ScrollArea.title: Scroll Area
ScrollArea.description: Augments native scroll functionality for custom, cross-browser styling.
ScrollArea.name: scroll-area

Select.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from—triggered by a button.
Select.name: select

keyboard.description:
When focus is on SelectTrigger, opens the select and focuses the selected item.
When focus is on an item, selects the focused item.

When focus is on SelectTrigger, opens the select and focuses the first item.
When focus is on an item, selects the focused item.

When focus is on SelectTrigger, opens the Select
When focus is on an item, moves focus to the next item.

Slider.title: Slider
Slider.description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.
Slider.name: slider

keyboard.description: Increases the value by the step amount.
Decreases the value by the step amount.
Increases the value by the step amount.
Decreases the value by the step amount.
Increases the value by a larger step.
Decreases the value by a larger step.
Increases the value by a larger step.
Decreases the value by a larger step.

Sets the value to its maximum.

Splitter.title: Splitter
Splitter.description: A component that divides your layout into resizable sections.
Splitter.name: splitter

keyboard.description: If the primary pane is not collapsed, collapses the pane. If the pane is collapsed, restores the splitter to its previous position.
Moves a horizontal splitter down.
Moves a horizontal splitter up.
Moves a vertical splitter to the right.
Moves a vertical splitter to the left.
Moves splitter to the position that gives the primary pane its smallest allowed size.
Moves splitter to the position that gives the primary pane its largest allowed size.

Stepper.title: Stepper
Stepper.description: A set of steps that are used to indicate progress through a multi-step process.
Stepper.name: stepper

keyboard.description: When focus moves onto the steps, focuses the first step .
Moves focus to the next step depending on orientation.
Moves focus to the next step depending on orientation .
Moves focus to the previous step depending on orientation .
Moves focus to the previous step depending on orientation .
Selects the focused step.

Switch.title: Switch
Switch.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.
Switch.name: switch

keyboard.description: Toggles the component"s state.
Toggles the component"s state.

Tabs.title: Tabs
Tabs.description: A set of layered sections of content—known as tab panels—that are displayed one at a time.
Tabs.name: tabs

keyboard.description: When focus moves onto the tabs, focuses the active trigger. When a trigger is focused, moves focus to the active content.
Moves focus to the next trigger depending on orientation and activates its associated content.
Moves focus to the next trigger depending on orientation and activates its associated content.
Moves focus to the previous trigger depending on orientation and activates its associated content.
Moves focus to the previous trigger depending on orientation and activates its associated content.
Moves focus to the first trigger and activates its associated content.
Moves focus to the last trigger and activates its associated content.

TagsInput.title: Tags Input
TagsInput.description: Tags input render tags inside an input, followed by an actual text input.
TagsInput.name: tags-input

keyboard.description: When tag is active, remove it and set the tag on right active.
When tag is active, remove it and set the tag on left active. If there are no tags to the left, either the next tags gets focus, or the input.
Set the next tag active.
Set the previous tag active.
Set the first tag active
Set the last tag active

TimeField.title: Time Field
TimeField.description: Enables users to input specific times within a designated field.
TimeField.name: time-field

Toast.title: Toast
Toast.description: A succinct message that is displayed temporarily.

Activates/deactivates the item.
Activates/deactivates the item.
Moves focus to the next item in the group.
Moves focus to the next item in the group.
Moves focus to the previous item in the group.

Moves focus to the first item.
Moves focus to the last item.

Toggle.title: Toggle
Toggle.description: A two-state button that can be either on or off.
Toggle.name: toggle

keyboard.description: Activates/deactivates the toggle.

Toolbar.title: Toolbar
Toolbar.description: A container for grouping a set of controls, such as buttons, toggle groups or dropdown menus.
Toolbar.name: toolbar

keyboard.description: Moves focus to the first item in the group.
Activates/deactivates the item.
Activates/deactivates the item.
Moves focus to the next item depending on orientation.
Moves focus to the next item depending on orientation.
Moves focus to the previous item depending on orientation .

Tooltip.title: Tooltip
Tooltip.description: A popup that displays information related to an element when the element receives keyboard focus or the mouse hovers over it.
Tooltip.name: tooltip

keyboard.description: Opens/closes the tooltip without delay.
If open, closes the tooltip without delay.
If open, closes the tooltip without delay.

Tree.title: Tree
Tree.description: A tree view widget displays a hierarchical list of items that can be expanded or collapsed to show or hide their child items, such as in a file system navigator.
Tree.name: tree

keyboard.description: When highlight on TreeItem, selects the focused item.
When focus is on TreeItem, moves focus to the next item.
When focus is on TreeItem, moves focus to the previous item.
When focus is on a closed TreeItem (node), it opens the node without moving focus. When on an open node, it moves focus to the first child node. When on an end node, it does nothing.

When focus is on an open TreeItem (node), closes the node. When focus is on a child node that is also either an end node or a closed node, moves focus to its parent node. When focus is on a root node that is also either an end node or a closed node, does nothing.
Moves focus first TreeItem
Moves focus last TreeItem
